head: nellie 0.1.0

Usage: nellie [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                     
                                                                               
 Nellie — Karna's internal AI agent harness.                                   
                                                                               
┌─ Options ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ --version
full:
Usage: nellie [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                     
                                                                               
 Nellie — Karna's internal AI agent harness.                                   
                                                                               
┌─ Options ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ --version             -V        Show version and exit.                      │
│ --install-completion            Install completion for the current shell.   │
│ --show-completion               Show completion for the current shell, to   │
│                                 copy it or customize the installation.      │
│ --help                          Show this message and exit.                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─ Commands ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ think    Toggle Nellie's extended-thinking mode.                            │
│ run      Execute a recipe YAML end-to-end.                                  │
│ serve    Run Nellie as a REST + SSE server over HTTP.                       │
│ web      Launch the web UI -- opens browser automatically.                  │
│ resume   Resume a previous session.                                         │
│ init     Initialize Nellie for this project.                                │
│ fork     Duplicate a session (messages + metadata) into a new session.      │
│ replay   Re-feed user messages through the active agent loop and print      │
│          responses.                                                         │
│ auth     Authentication commands.                                           │
│ model    Model selection commands.                                          │
│ config   Configuration commands.                                            │
│ mcp      MCP server management commands.                                    │
│ acp      Agent Client Protocol (ACP) server commands.                       │
│ history  Session history commands.                                          │
│ cost     Cost tracking commands.                                            │
│ cron     Scheduled agent jobs.                                              │
│ index    Knowledge base indexing commands.                                  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

│ login    Store credentials for a model provider.                            │

┌─ Commands ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ add           Add an MCP server to the configuration.                       │
│ list          List configured MCP servers.                                  │
│ remove        Remove an MCP server from the configuration.                  │
│ serve         Run Nellie as an MCP server over stdio.                       │
│ serve-memory  Start the Memory MCP server (JSON-RPC over stdio).            │
│ test          Test an MCP server connection (connect + list tools).         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ Options ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

full:
Usage: nellie cron [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                
                                                                               
 Scheduled agent jobs.                                                         
                                                                               
┌─ Options ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─ Commands ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ add      Register a new scheduled job.                                      │
│ list     List every configured cron job.                                    │
│ remove   Delete a cron job by id.                                           │
│ enable   Enable a cron job.                                                 │
│ disable  Disable a cron job.                                                │
│ tick     Run any due cron jobs once (for OS-level cron wrapping).           │
│ run      Run a single cron job immediately, regardless of schedule.         │
│ daemon   Start a long-running daemon that checks for due jobs periodically. │
│ show     Show full details for one cron job.                                │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Usage: nellie run [OPTIONS]                                                   
                                                                               
 Execute a recipe YAML end-to-end.                                             
                                                                               
 A recipe bundles instructions + parameters + tool allowlist + model           
 pin into one reusab
full:
Usage: nellie run [OPTIONS]                                                   
                                                                               
 Execute a recipe YAML end-to-end.                                             
                                                                               
 A recipe bundles instructions + parameters + tool allowlist + model           
 pin into one reusable spec. Goose-parity surface.                             
                                                                               
┌─ Options ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ *  --recipe     -r      TEXT  Path to a recipe YAML file [required]         │
│    --param      -p      TEXT  key=value recipe parameter (repeatable)       │
│    --workspace  -w      TEXT  Directory the recipe's tools should scope to  │
│                               (bash cwd + write/edit allowed_roots)         │
│    --help                     Show this message and exit.                   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

head:
Usage: nellie serve [OPTIONS]                                                 
                                                                               
 Run Nellie as a REST + SSE server over HTTP.                                  
                                                                               
 Exposes session-scoped agent turns via ``/v1/sessions`` and live              
 events via ``/v1/se
full:
Usage: nellie serve [OPTIONS]                                                 
                                                                               
 Run Nellie as a REST + SSE server over HTTP.                                  
                                                                               
 Exposes session-scoped agent turns via ``/v1/sessions`` and live              
 events via ``/v1/sessions/{id}/events`` (Server-Sent Events).                 
 Requires the ``rest`` optional extra: ``pip install 'karna'``.                
                                                                               
┌─ Options ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ --host        TEXT     Bind address [default: 127.0.0.1]                    │
│ --port        INTEGER  Bind port [default: 3030]                            │
│ --help                 Show this message and exit.                          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

head:
Usage: nellie web [OPTIONS]                                                   
                                                                               
 Launch the web UI -- opens browser automatically.                             
                                                                               
 Serves a browser-based interface with session management, live                
 transcript streamin
full:
Usage: nellie web [OPTIONS]                                                   
                                                                               
 Launch the web UI -- opens browser automatically.                             
                                                                               
 Serves a browser-based interface with session management, live                
 transcript streaming, recipe browsing, and memory management.                 
 Requires the ``webui`` optional extra: ``pip install 'karna'``.               
                                                                               
┌─ Options ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ --host        TEXT     Bind address [default: 127.0.0.1]                    │
│ --port        INTEGER  Bind port [default: 3030]                            │
│ --help                 Show this message and exit.                          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Usage: nellie init [OPTIONS]                                                  
                                                                               
 Initialize Nellie for this project.

 Detects existing configs (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules) and imports.

Usage: nellie think [OPTIONS] [MODE]                                          
                                                                               
 Toggle Nellie's extended-thinking mode.                                       
                                                                               
 ``on``   — always request a reasoning budget from the provider.               
 ``off``  — never re
full:
Usage: nellie think [OPTIONS] [MODE]                                          
                                                                               
 Toggle Nellie's extended-thinking mode.                                       
                                                                               
 ``on``   — always request a reasoning budget from the provider.               
 ``off``  — never request reasoning.                                           
 ``auto`` — let Nellie pick based on the active model name (default).          
                                                                               
 Called with no argument, prints the current setting and how it                
 resolves for the currently active model.                                      
                                                                               
┌─ Arguments ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│   mode      [MODE]  on | off | auto. Omit to show current state.            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─ Options ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
